name: n8n:content-design
tagline: n8n UI-copy content designer: writes, reviews, and audits button/error/tooltip/i18n text against style and terminology rules.
verdict: Strong quality: precise Do/Don't examples for every rule, clear Write/Review/Audit modes, defined table output, and grep patterns for audits. Read-only/advisory with Edit access only — no security concerns. Hygiene gaps: a colon in the name breaks kebab-case, and there is no version or changelog signal to track drift.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' exclusions anywhere; a broad content-design persona with no stated scope limit beyond n8n UI copy.
Frontmatter name is 'n8n:content-design' — the colon breaks kebab-case (^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$).
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
